---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-31"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
packages <- c("rlang", "ggplot2", "ggalluvial", "dplyr", "networkD3", "htmlwidgets")

to_install <- packages[!sapply(packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]

if (length(to_install) > 0) {
  install.packages(to_install)
}
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggalluvial)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(networkD3)
library(htmlwidgets)

input_csv  <- "../study_fetch_sampling/data/papers_coded.csv"
```

```{r}
df <- read.csv(input_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

```{r}
counts <- df %>%
  summarise(
    specified.audience = list(count(., specified.audience, sort = TRUE))
  )

counts$specified.audience[[1]]
```

```{r}
counts <- df %>%
  separate_rows(specified.role.of.visualization, sep = "\\r?\\n") %>%
  summarise(
    specified.role.of.visualization = list(count(., specified.role.of.visualization, sort = TRUE))
  )

counts$specified.role.of.visualization[[1]]
```

```{r}
counts <- df %>%
  separate_rows(evaluation.setting, sep = "\\r?\\n") %>%
  summarise(
    evaluation.setting = list(count(., evaluation.setting, sort = TRUE))
  )

counts$evaluation.setting[[1]]
```

```{r}
counts <- df %>%
  separate_rows(evaluation.measures, sep = "\\r?\\n") %>%
  summarise(
    evaluation.measures = list(count(., evaluation.measures, sort = TRUE))
  )

counts$evaluation.measures[[1]]
```

# TODO: How to make a Sankey with multiple labels?

```{r}
df_long <- df %>%
  separate_rows(specified.role.of.visualization, sep = "\\r?\\n") %>%
  separate_rows(evaluation.setting, sep = "\\r?\\n") %>%
  separate_rows(evaluation.measures, sep = "\\r?\\n")
```

```{r}
df_sankey <- df_long %>%
  select(specified.audience, specified.role.of.visualization, evaluation.setting, evaluation.measures) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(specified.audience),
    !is.na(specified.role.of.visualization),
    !is.na(evaluation.setting),
    !is.na(evaluation.measures)
  )
```

```{r}
links_1 <- df_sankey %>%
  transmute(
    source = specified.audience,
    target = specified.role.of.visualization
  ) %>%
  count(source, target, name = "value")

links_2 <- df_sankey %>%
  transmute(
    source = specified.role.of.visualization,
    target = evaluation.setting
  ) %>%
  count(source, target, name = "value")

links_3 <- df_sankey %>%
  transmute(
    source = evaluation.setting,
    target = evaluation.measures
  ) %>%
  count(source, target, name = "value")

links <- bind_rows(links_1, links_2, links_3)

# Build nodes
nodes <- data.frame(
  name = unique(c(links$source, links$target)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Assign each node to a stage
audience_vals <- unique(df_sankey$specified.audience)
role_vals     <- unique(df_sankey$specified.role.of.visualization)
setting_vals  <- unique(df_sankey$evaluation.setting)
measure_vals  <- unique(df_sankey$evaluation.measures)

nodes <- nodes %>%
  mutate(
    stage = case_when(
      name %in% audience_vals ~ "Audience",
      name %in% role_vals ~ "Role",
      name %in% setting_vals ~ "Setting",
      name %in% measure_vals ~ "Measure",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

# Build links with source/target ids
links_d3 <- links %>%
  mutate(
    source_id = match(source, nodes$name) - 1,
    target_id = match(target, nodes$name) - 1,
    link_group = case_when(
      source %in% audience_vals ~ "Audience_to_Role",
      source %in% role_vals ~ "Role_to_Setting",
      source %in% setting_vals ~ "Setting_to_Measure",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

# One shared color scale for both nodes and links
colour_scale <- JS(
'd3.scaleOrdinal()
  .domain([
    "Audience", "Role", "Setting", "Measure",
    "Audience_to_Role", "Role_to_Setting", "Setting_to_Measure", "Other"
  ])
  .range([
    // --- NODE COLORS (dark, saturated) ---
    "#3F2A84",  // Audience (deep purple)
    "#2F5597",  // Role (deep blue)
    "#007C91",  // Setting (teal / turquoise)
    "#5B3F8C",  // Measure (muted purple variant)

    // --- LINK COLORS (lighter versions) ---
    "#9A8FD1",  // Audience → Role
    "#7EA6E0",  // Role → Setting
    "#5BC0BE",  // Setting → Measure
    "#CCCCCC"   // Other
  ])'
)
```

```{r}
nodes$name <- nodes$name %>%
  gsub("In-the-wild/naturalistic public deployment", "In-the-wild public deployment", .) %>%
  gsub("Controlled laboratory study", "Controlled lab study", .) %>%
  gsub("Observation/ethnographic methods", "Observation/ethnography", .)

p <- sankeyNetwork(
  Links = links_d3,
  Nodes = nodes,
  Source = "source_id",
  Target = "target_id",
  Value = "value",
  NodeID = "name",
  NodeGroup = "stage",
  LinkGroup = "link_group",
  fontSize = 13,
  nodeWidth = 36,
  nodePadding = 18,
  width = 1000,
  height = 500,
  colourScale = colour_scale
)

# Additional styling via JavaScript
p <- onRender(p, '
  function(el, x) {
    d3.select(el).selectAll(".node rect")
      .style("stroke", "none");
  
    d3.select(el).selectAll(".node text")
      .style("font-family", "sans-serif")
      .style("font-weight", "500");
  }
')

p
```

```{r}
saveWidget(p, "../sankey.html", selfcontained = TRUE)
```
